title: State of Vermont Governor's Office, Jason Maulucci, Director of Policy Dev & Legislative Affairs, Return to Office Communications

communications.subject: Vermont Public Records Act Request: State of Vermont Governor's Office, Jason Maulucci, Director of Policy Dev & Legislative Affairs, Return to Office Communications
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Vermont Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

* Email messages and message contents with the keywords "RTO" or "Return to Office" in the email message subject or message body sent or received by Jason Maulucci, Director of Policy Development & Legislative Affairs, inclusive of 2024, 2025, and 2026 to date.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Brandon Galbraith

title: State of Vermont, Agency of Administration, Secretary Sarah Clark, Return to Office Communications

communications.subject: Vermont Public Records Act Request: State of Vermont, Agency of Administration, Secretary Sarah Clark, Return to Office Communications
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Vermont Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

* Email messages and message contents with the keywords "RTO" or "Return to Office" in the email message subject or message body sent or received by Sarah Clark, Secretary, Agency of Administration of Vermont, inclusive of 2024, 2025, and 2026 to date.

* Record retention schedule for records related to this office

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Brandon Galbraith
